content.title: Purpose
content.body: Would guide flow and subflow planning inside App Behavior packages.

content.title: Already Decision-Complete
content.body: The corpus supports progressive refinement from feature overview to journey, flow, subflow, scenario, and acceptance criteria.

content.title: Needs Clarity
content.body: Needs exact model/schema field mapping and stop condition for when a flow requires its own roadmap.

content.title: Authority To Review
content.body: Review ux-system model and examples before promotion.

content.title: Promotion Criteria
content.body: Promote when repeated flow planning shows this reduces decision burden beyond the parent App Behavior roadmap.

content.title: Possible Outcomes
content.body: Promote, merge into parent, keep as optional appendix, or delete.
